name: Demon Hunter
short_description: Defeat demons to improve your stats and feel the speed of combat
detailed_description:
A once-prosperous city was destroyed overnight by an invasion by a demon army. The survivors fled to the "Silver Lake Village" and desperately built walls to hold out, but the demons' onslaught continues. It's only a matter of time before the village falls. Their only hope lies with you, the legendary hero who can reclaim the devastated land.

This game is a "growth"-focused RPG, where players constantly strive to become stronger. The core gameplay flow is as follows:

Battle (Monster Slaying): Explore dangerous dungeons and fields, slaying countless monsters.

Growth (Level Up): Defeat monsters to gain experience and level up. Distribute stats and acquire new skills to develop your character.

Farming & Crafting: Obtain materials or blueprints from monsters. Use these to craft powerful equipment.

Enhancement: Enhance crafted or acquired items to become even more powerful and prepare for the next dungeon.

These four processes are organically linked to provide the fun of 'killing stronger monsters -> obtaining/crafting better rewards -> strengthening stronger items -> achieving higher levels'.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal
